parameters.query:
WITH primary_row AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (slug) *
  FROM datap4k_mining_norm
  ORDER BY slug,
    CASE section
      WHEN 'elements'        THEN 1
      WHEN 'compositions'    THEN 2
      WHEN 'planet-mineables' THEN 3
      ELSE 4
    END,
    id
),
composition_parts AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (slug) slug, parts
  FROM datap4k_mining_norm
  WHERE section = 'compositions' AND parts IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY slug, id
),
all_sections AS (
  SELECT
    slug,
    jsonb_agg(DISTINCT section ORDER BY section) AS sections_present
  FROM datap4k_mining_norm
  GROUP BY slug
),
body_name_map (body_code, body_name, body_slug, body_entity_type) AS (VALUES
  ('STANTON1',  'Hurston',   'hurston',   'planet'),
  ('STANTON1A', 'Arial',     'arial',     'moon'),
  ('STANTON1B', 'Aberdeen',  'aberdeen',  'moon'),
  ('STANTON1C', 'Magda',     'magda',     'moon'),
  ('STANTON1D', 'Ita',       'ita',       'moon'),
  ('STANTON2',  'Crusader',  'crusader',  'planet'),
  ('STANTON2A', 'Cellin',    'cellin',    'moon'),
  ('STANTON2B', 'Daymar',    'daymar',    'moon'),
  ('STANTON2C', 'Yela',      'yela',      'moon'),
  ('STANTON3',  'ArcCorp',   'arccorp',   'planet'),
  ('STANTON3A', 'Lyria',     'lyria',     'moon'),
  ('STANTON3B', 'Wala',      'wala',      'moon'),
  ('STANTON4',  'MicroTech', 'microtech', 'planet'),
  ('STANTON4A', 'Calliope',  'calliope',  'moon'),
  ('STANTON4B', 'Clio',      'clio',      'moon'),
  ('STANTON4C', 'Euterpe',   'euterpe',   'moon')
)
INSERT INTO entity_display (
  slug, entity_type, name, manufacturer, category, uex_id,
  is_base_variant, payload, search_vector, built_at
)
SELECT
  pr.slug,
  'mining',
  COALESCE(bnm.body_name, pr.name),
  NULL,
  pr.section,
  pr.uex_id,
  TRUE,
  jsonb_build_object(
    'name',                  COALESCE(bnm.body_name, pr.name),
    'section',               pr.section,
    'sections_present',      asec.sections_present,
    'mining_type',           pr.mining_type,
    'rarity',                pr.rarity,
    'resistance',            pr.resistance,
    'instability',           pr.instability,
    'explosion',             pr.explosion,
    'optimal_window_mid',    pr.optimal_window_mid,
    'optimal_window_thin',   pr.optimal_window_thin,
    'rock_type',             pr.rock_type,
    'min_distinct',          pr.min_distinct,
    'body',                  pr.body,
    'body_name',             bnm.body_name,
    'body_slug',             bnm.body_slug,
    'body_entity_type',      bnm.body_entity_type,
    'locations',             pr.locations,
    'parts',                 COALESCE(pr.parts, cp.parts),
    'hand_mineables',        pr.hand_mineables,
    'ship_mineables',        pr.ship_mineables,
    'source_id',             pr.source_id,
    'source_slug',           pr.source_slug,
    'uex_id',                pr.uex_id,
    'uex_slug',              el.uex_slug,
    'uex_link_match',        el.match_field,
    'sold_at',               '[]'::jsonb,
    'sold_at_dp4k',          '[]'::jsonb,
    'crossref', CASE WHEN esc.id IS NOT NULL THEN jsonb_build_object(
      'rsi_slug',     esc.rsi_slug,
      'uex_slug',     esc.uex_slug,
      'datap4k_slug', esc.datap4k_slug,
      'source',       esc.source,
      'verified',     esc.verified
    ) ELSE NULL END
  ),
  to_tsvector('english',
    COALESCE(bnm.body_name, pr.name, '') || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(pr.name, '')         || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(pr.section, '')      || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(pr.mining_type, '')  || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(pr.rarity, '')       || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(pr.rock_type, '')    || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(comm.code, '')
  ),
  now()
FROM primary_row pr
LEFT JOIN datap4k_entity_links el   ON el.id = pr.entity_link_id
LEFT JOIN composition_parts cp      ON cp.slug = pr.slug
LEFT JOIN all_sections asec          ON asec.slug = pr.slug
LEFT JOIN body_name_map bnm          ON bnm.body_code = pr.body
LEFT JOIN entity_slug_crossref esc  ON esc.entity_type = CASE pr.section
    WHEN 'elements'         THEN 'mining_element'
    WHEN 'compositions'     THEN 'mining_composition'
    WHEN 'planet-mineables' THEN 'mining_mineable'
  END AND esc.datap4k_slug = pr.slug
LEFT JOIN commodities comm           ON comm.slug = el.uex_slug
ON CONFLICT (slug, entity_type) DO UPDATE SET
  name            = EXCLUDED.name,
  manufacturer    = EXCLUDED.manufacturer,
  category        = EXCLUDED.category,
  uex_id          = EXCLUDED.uex_id,
  is_base_variant = EXCLUDED.is_base_variant,
  payload         = EXCLUDED.payload,
  search_vector   = EXCLUDED.search_vector,
  built_at        = now()
